sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Fast, narrow, rollback-aware repair path for live game incidents.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.summary: - identify the live failure precisely - bound blast radius and affected environments - choose the smallest safe fix - require the minimum viable verification - record rollback poin

sections.title: Doctrine
sections.summary: Hotfix is not "ship but faster." It is a separate operating mode optimized for damaged trust, damaged revenue, or damaged play. Good hotfix behavior: - fix the failing surface, not

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: What is the smallest fix that safely stops the damage?
